purpose: Source manifest for an archive.org item preserving 2007-era demo/walkthrough videos of The Venice Project (Joost), the Kazaa/Skype founders' P2P television service.

videos.title: First test of the Venice Project
The venice Project
videos.description: Un video del programa the venice project, para ver tv por internet, de los creadores de skype y kazaa

videos.title: The Venice Project or Joost
videos.description: short movie about the new project of Skype co-founders, called Joost

videos.title: Behind The Scenes at The Venice Project (Joost) - Sander
videos.description: Head of engineering at The Venice Project (now Joost), walking his dogs and talking a bit about why he chose to work on The Venice Project, what it will be like, peer-2-peer and beta-testing.

videos.title: Behind The Scenes at The Venice Project (Joost) - Dirk
videos.description: The Venice Project's (now Joost) head of technology explaining some of the technology that powers their TV.

videos.title: Behind The Scenes at The Venice Project (Joost) - Henrik
videos.description: One of the top guys at The Venice Project (now Joost) talking about some of the problems with TV at the moment and what the future holds.

videos.title: Behind The Scenes at The Venice Project (Joost) - Janus
videos.description: Janus Friis in a phone interview talking about how and why he founded The Venice Project (now Joost).

videos.title: Joost Beta Video Review
videos.description: This covers the basics of Joost (formerly The Venice Project), a new IPTV/Video on Demand service from the creators of Skype and KaZaa.

videos.title: JOOST Beta Test (Test Drive)
videos.description:
O JOOST é bem melhor do que mostrado nesse vídeo. Meu programa de captura de imagens não funcionou muito bem... Sorry!

"JOOST" is much better! *The "images capture's software" don´t worked fine...
JOOST = Amazing!!!

Caê - http://caeportal.spaces.live.com

videos.title: Joost introduction
videos.description: Here the introduction movies to joost when you play it for the first time .

videos.title: Joost
videos.description:
Aqui fica um pequeno video do Joost TV

Eu já sou beta tester!!! e até ver, estou a gostar!

videos.title: Joost hidden new UI
videos.description: Joost is apparently working on a new User Interface for it's player.  Here is a short video of it as it is currently in client 0.11.

videos.title: How To: Get Rid of Choppy Video in Joost
videos.description: How To: Get Rid of Choppy Video in Joost

videos.title: Joost Media Player
videos.description: Joost Media Player is an Adobe Air application that is fully integrated with Joost.com. Working in collaboration with the Creative and Engineering teams from Joost, this is a must see. Constant video play while searching, Twitter integration and fullscreen remote control capable.

status: 4 of 15 videos present (copied from IA item 'joost'); 11 pending fetch-videos.sh from a non-datacenter network (YouTube CDN blocks this environment).
